title: CENTER FOR HEALTHY RELATIONSHIPS - 211info
text: UNIVERSITY OF OREGON HEDCO CLINIC CENTER FOR HEALTHY RELATIONSHIPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Training clinic for the College of Education’s Couples and Family Therapy master’s program. Clinic is staffed by graduate therapists who are supervised by faculty and clinicians. Offers individual, relationship, and group therapy services to the general community. Accepts most clients with presenting issues that would benefit from therapy (high-risk intakes such as suicidal/homicidal ideation, domestic violence, etc., are evaluated before acceptance). Not a crisis clinic but accept clients in crisis for regular services (these clients are also referred to White Bird for crisis needs). Note: Clinicians do not provide forensic testimony or offer services for court testimony. 1655 Alder Street Suite 170 Eugene, OR 97403 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday by appointment only Email (541) 346-0923 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 346-0923 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Sliding scale fee ranging from $0-$150 DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the south wing of the HEDCO building on the University of Oregon campus Services: Conjoint Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - COMPREHENSIVE DIAGNOSTIC ASSESSMENT CLINIC HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SPEECH LANGUAGE AND HEARING CENTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING PSYCHOLOGY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNIVERSITY OF OREGON HEDCO CLINIC
